value.found_quote: For code-first SDK workflows, start with [Integrations and observability](https://developers.openai.com/api/docs/guides/agents/integrations-observability#tracing) to get high-signal traces before you formalize graders.
value.rationale: The page explicitly mentions "Integrations and observability" as an offering linked from the OpenAI developer documentation, and directly associates it with providing "high-signal traces" for "code-first SDK workflows," which matches the claim precisely. The page presents this as a current, active recommendation without any deprecation or preview language.
